name: revelo
description: Reveal and edit GitHub, Sentry, and Jira issues from references in your code comments and Markdown.

revelo.github.defaultRepo.description: Fallback owner/repo for bare #123 references when no git remote is found.

revelo.sentry.enabled.description: Enable Sentry reference detection. Requires a Sentry token (Revelo: Set Sentry Token).

revelo.sentry.apiBaseUrl.description: Sentry base URL. Use a region host (e.g. https://us.sentry.io, https://de.sentry.io) or your self-hosted URL.

revelo.sentry.orgSlug.description: Default Sentry organization slug, used to resolve short IDs and URLs without an org.

revelo.sentry.shortIdPrefixes.description: Uppercased project slugs to treat as Sentry short IDs (e.g. ["C3-FRONTEND", "CASH-SMARTCASH-HSBC-INTEGRATION"]). Matches the full slug before the issue number. Prevents matching unrelated text like UTF-8.

revelo.sentry.enableEditing.description: Show editing controls (change status) in the Sentry panel. Requires your Sentry token to have the event:write scope.

revelo.jira.enabled.description: Enable Jira reference detection. Requires siteUrl, email, and a token (Revelo: Set Jira Token).

revelo.jira.siteUrl.description: Jira Cloud site URL, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net

revelo.jira.email.description: Atlassian account email, used with the API token for Basic auth.

revelo.jira.projectKeys.description: Project keys to treat as Jira issues (e.g. ["ABC", "PROJ"]). When set, only these prefixes match bare keys — prevents false positives like UTF-8. Leave empty to match any key not on the denylist.

revelo.cache.ttlSeconds.description: How long fetched reference details are cached, in seconds.

scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node rolldown.config.mjs --production
